name: manage_agent_memory
description: Record, search, list, or delete local agent procedural memories. Use this for reusable tool/workflow lessons, not for user preferences or personal facts. Memories are injected progressively when relevant and never override user instructions.

title.description: Short procedural memory title for record.

content.description: Reusable lesson, written as an actionable workflow/tool rule.

tags.description: Optional searchable tags such as tools, sqlite, search, docs.

confidence.description: Confidence that this lesson is reusable.
